name: chr3p11_pericentric_alpha_HSat
description: Chromosome 3 p-arm pericentric flank (3p11), the immediate sub-centromeric LCR shoreline on the p-side of the chr3 centromere. Alpha-satellite (D3Z1), pericentromeric SDs and HSat3 patches. Largely unassembled in GRCh38; resolved in T2T-CHM13.

architecture.internal_structure: alpha-sat HOR + HSat3 patches + Horvath/She pericentromeric SD shoreline.
